text: GP2013 has been characterised to be highly similar to the originator product (innovator rituximab) in terms of primary and higher order structure, post-translational modifications and size heterogeneity. In addition, an extensive suite of functional release tests was performed confirming the biological activity of GP2013 to be the same as the originator product.
explanation: The text uses domain-specific regulatory biosimilar language with precise terminology and a concise, non-redundant structure; this pattern is common in human-written dossiers, though high-quality AI could imitate it.
